# Telemetry selectors report (1d)
# args: {__name__=~"e2etelemetry:etcd_job_exists:max|e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max|e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum"}
# Results depend on the queried Prometheus instance and may differ elsewhere.
selectors:
  - selector: '{__name__=~"e2etelemetry:etcd_job_exists:max|e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max|e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum"}'
    metrics:
      - name: e2etelemetry:etcd_job_exists:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: max(e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            └── e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="etcd"}
                  <expr: max by (job) (etcd_server_has_leader)>
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
                └── etcd_server_has_leader
                      <job: etcd> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: max(e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="ghost"})
          tree: |-
            └── e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="ghost"}
                  <expr: max by (job) (etcd_server_has_leader)>
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
                └── etcd_server_has_leader
                      <job: etcd> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum(e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="etcd"}) + sum(e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="ghost"})
          tree: |-
            ├── e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="etcd"}
            │     <expr: max by (job) (etcd_server_has_leader)>
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   └── etcd_server_has_leader
            │         <job: etcd> <peak_series: N>
            └── e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job="ghost"}
                  <expr: max by (job) (etcd_server_has_leader)>
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
    failing_checks:
      count: 10
      messages:
        - metric "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - metric "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_exists:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max" depends on "e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job=\"ghost\"}" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum" depends on "e2etelemetry:etcd_by_job:max{job=\"ghost\"}" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_exists:max" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_ghost:max" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:etcd_job_mixed:sum" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
